scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f docker/standalone.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker/standalone.yml up -d
scripts.build:counter: cd apps/counter/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:token: cd apps/token/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:election: cd apps/election/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:fungible-token: cd apps/fungible-token/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:nft: cd apps/nft/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:multi-token: cd apps/multi-token/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:access-control: cd apps/access-control/contract && npm run compact && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:counter && npm run build:token && npm run build:election && npm run build:fungible-token && npm run build:nft && npm run build:multi-token && npm run build:access-control
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p apps/counter/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/token/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/election/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/fungible-token/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/nft/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/multi-token/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/access-control/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
